2603.20042.title: LoASR-Bench: Evaluating Large Speech Language Models on Low-Resource Automatic Speech Recognition Across Language Families
2603.20042.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have driven substantial advances in speech language models (SpeechLMs), yielding strong performance in automatic speech recognition (ASR) under high-resource conditions. However, existing benchmarks predominantly focus on high-resource languages, leaving the ASR behavior of SpeechLMs in low-resource languages insufficiently understood. This gap is critical, as practical ASR systems must reliably support low-resource languages and generalize across diverse language families, and it directly hinders the deployment of SpeechLM-based ASR in real-world multilingual scenarios. As a result, it is essential to evaluate SpeechLMs on low-resource languages to ensure their generalizability across different language families. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{LoASR-Bench}, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate \textbf{lo}w-resource \textbf{a}utomatic \textbf{s}peech \textbf{r}ecognition (\textbf{ASR}) of the latest SpeechLMs across diverse language families. LoASR-Bench comprises 25 languages from 9 language families, featuring both Latin and non-Latin scripts, enabling cross-linguistic and cross-script assessment of ASR performance of current SpeechLMs. Experimental results highlight the limitations of the latest SpeechLMs in handling real-world low-resource languages.
2603.20042.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在語音語言模型（SpeechLMs）方面推動了實質性的進展，並在高資源條件下實現了自動語音識別（ASR）的強勁表現。<lb/>然而，現有的基準主要集中在高資源語言上，對於低資源語言中SpeechLM的ASR行為了解不足。<lb/>這一差距是關鍵的，因為實際的ASR系統必須可靠地支持低資源語言並在不同語言家族之間進行泛化，這直接妨礙了基於SpeechLM的ASR在現實多語言場景中的部署。<lb/>因此，評估低資源語言中的SpeechLM至關重要，以確保其在不同語言家族中的泛化能力。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了\textbf{LoASR-Bench}，這是一個全面的基準，旨在評估最新SpeechLM在不同語言家族中的\textbf{lo}w-resource \textbf{a}utomatic \textbf{s}peech \textbf{r}ecognition（\textbf{ASR}）。<lb/>LoASR-Bench包括來自9個語言家族的25種語言，涵蓋拉丁字母和非拉丁字母的書寫系統，能夠對當前SpeechLM的ASR性能進行跨語言和跨書寫系統的評估。<lb/>實驗結果突顯了最新SpeechLM在處理現實低資源語言方面的局限性。
2603.20042.author: Jianan Chen et.al.
2603.20042.authors: Jianan Chen, Xiaoxue Gao, Tatsuya Kawahara, Nancy F. Chen
